task_description: Build a production-ready, Awwwards-quality website for CACOYANNIS LIMITED - a premium Web Design, UI/UX Design, and Website Development studio. Next.js 15 with TypeScript, App Router, GSAP animations, and luxury white-dominated aesthetic.

verification.summary: Production build generates all 11 pages successfully. Lint passes with zero errors. Post-review fixes applied: cursor event delegation, reduced-motion fallbacks, focus trapping in modals, and poster attribute removal. All components use proper GSAP cleanup, accessibility attributes, and responsive design.
